title: 『カレーにチョコを入れても隠し味』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as the Satsuki Sho draws near, Mejiro
Ardan and Yaeno Muteki inform me that they
won't partner run with their rival Sakura Chiyono
O for a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Mejiro Ardan has made up her mind.
Although it may destroy her legs, she's going to
shine just as bright as her sister—even if it's just
for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Yaeno Muteki reflects on all the
support her grandfather has given her. She's
determined to repay him by showing him the
extent of her growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Sakura Chiyono O is just as determined.
Maruzensky was a cut above the rest, but she
missed out on her opportunity to run in the
Derby. Which is why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O wants to prove Maruzensky's
strength by completing her role model's dream
and winning it in her stead. She swears she
absolutely won't lose.
